name: Compass Group Chile S.A. Administradora General de Fondos - Compass COF III Private Debt Fondo de In
summary: Compass Group Chile S.A. Administradora General de Fondos - Compass COF III Private Debt Fondo de In is a private debt investment fund. It is managed by Compass Group Chile S.A. Administradora General de Fondos and invests in private debt instruments through the COF III structure.
